response.overview: Inspired by a true story. Hanim (Nadia Aqilah) and Syauqi (Fikhree Bakar) marry at a young age while in their final year of university. They are blessed with 4 children: Harith (Syed Ali Murthada), Athirah (Aresya Rania), Uzair (Al Rayyan Ho) and Uwais (Syed Muhammad Baqir). As their children grow up, Hanim begins to suspect something different about Uzair. His development is different, Uzair does not speak and is weak in vocabulary mastery, tends to have tantrums, shows no interest in toys, sleeps late and is always energetic. The doctor confirms that Uzair is positively autistic at the age of 3 years old. Thus begins their family life shrouded in physical, financial, emotional and spiritual challenges.
response.title: Cycle Uzair Cycle
